beat: Unstable ancient Rift at Commons fringe
artPrompt: Splash-leaning comic page, no text. Mira at the mossy fringe of Riftwild Commons where a vertical cyan Fracture tear hangs wrong over mud and birch. Ancient stone teeth half-swallowed by roots. Tension, not horror-movie gore. Earth greens and sandstone; cyan only on the tear. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Beyond the last honest lamp, the fringe still argues with the Fracture.

lines.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
lines.text: You're not on any survey map. Good. Maps lie when roads rewrite.
